code:
import io
import string
import list

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if not has_prev or v != prev
            result = list.push(result, v)
            prev = v
            has_prev = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let total = list.len(result)
  while j < total
    match list.get(result, j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    println("")
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  end
end
